channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: China landslide kills 8, at least 34 missing: Officials

- China landslide kills 8, at least 34 missing: officials

- Landslide in China's Chongqing city kills 8, leaves 34 missing
- Watch: Deadly landslide strikes China, dozens remain missing
- China: Landslide buries buildings, traps people in southwest
- Landslide in southwest China traps residents as rescue operation continues
- Landslide in southwest China traps people, rescue efforts underway
- Landslide in southwest China traps people, rescue efforts underway
- Landslide in southwest China traps people, rescue efforts underway]]>

- Uganda school bus crash kills 21
- Uganda school bus crash kills 21
- School bus crash kills at least 20 pupils in Uganda
- School bus crash kills at least 20 pupils in Uganda]]>

- Andy Burnham confirmed as new Labour leader, U.K. PM-designate

- Flash: Andy Burnham confirmed as Britain's Labour Party leader, set to become new PM

- Andy Burnham to be made UK Labour leader on way to becoming prime minister

item.title: China slams Trump’s claims over 2020 US election interference
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump makes unverified claims of China ‘election meddling’ as critics fear ploy to challenge midterm results
- China blasts ‘unfounded smears’ as Trump’s election claims threaten diplomatic thaw
- Trump’s Allegations of Chinese Interference in U.S. Elections Stir Tensions With Beijing
- What is Trump trying to achieve with China election claims?
- 'Don't use China as an issue': Beijing hits back after Trump alleges election 'meddling'
- Trump’s Allegations of Chinese Interference in U.S. Elections Stir Tensions With Beijing
- China rejects Trump’s election meddling claims as ‘fabricated’ and ‘slanderous’
- Trump alleges China interference in US elections amid suspicion he's prepping for mid-term loss
- Chinese MFA calls Trump's election interference allegations fabrications
- China rejects Trump's election interference claim as 'groundless accusations'
- Trump alleges China interfered in 2020 election
- China slams Trump claims of US election meddling as 'pure fabrications'
- Donald Trump accuses China of meddling in US elections
- Trump’s China election-interference claims spark scapegoat fears among Asian-Americans
- Trump's stunning China election interference claim sparks fierce debate | What we know so far
- Trump revives sweeping election fraud claims ahead of US midterms, accuses China of meddling
- Trump’s China election claims mark new front in the rivalry, analysts say
- Trump accuses China of 2020 voting interference, contradicting US intelligence findings
- Trump accuses China of 2020 voting interference, contradicting US intelligence findings]]>

item.title: UN urges probe into deaths in Pakistani-administered Kashmir unrest
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- UN urges probe into reports of deadly unrest in Pakistani-administered Kashmir]]>

item.title: J.K. Rowling condemns Amnesty for branding her women’s crisis centre anti-rights
item.source: South China Morning Post (+1 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Harry Potter author J.K. Rowling blasts Amnesty’s ‘anti-rights’ label on women’s centre]]>

item.title: Brenda Fricker cause of death: Oscar-winning Irish actress dies at 81, tributes pour in ‘We will never see…’
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Brenda Fricker, the first Irish actress to win an Oscar for ‘My Left Foot,’ dies at 81
- Brenda Fricker, Oscar winner for My Left Foot, dies aged 81]]>
